basics.name: Jane Doe
basics.label: Senior Software Engineer
basics.summary: Innovative Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience building scalable, high-performance web applications. Passionate about clean code, open-source contribution, and mentoring junior developers.

work.name: Tech Innovators Inc.
work.summary: Led a team of 8 engineers in the migration of legacy architecture to a microservices-based system, improving application speed by 45%.
highlights: Architected and deployed a highly scalable event-driven system using Node.js and Kafka.
Reduced cloud hosting costs by 25% by optimizing resource allocation and database indexing.
Mentored junior developers and established automated CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions.

work.name: StartUp Labs
work.summary: Developed and maintained core features for a fintech SaaS product targeting SMBs.
highlights: Implemented secure payment gateway integrations utilizing Stripe APIs.
Created comprehensive test suites (Jest, Cypress) leading to a 50% drop in production bugs.

volunteer.summary: Volunteered weekly to teach basic programming concepts to underprivileged youths.
highlights: Designed curriculum for introductory JavaScript and Python workshops.
Facilitated group projects resulting in 15+ student-built web applications.

awards.title: Innovator of the Year
awards.summary: Awarded for exceptional leadership in delivering the company's Q3 major product rollout ahead of schedule.

publications.name: Building Scalable Microservices
publications.summary: A deep dive into strategies for preventing data consistency issues in distributed systems.

projects.name: Resume Builder CLI
projects.description: An open-source command-line tool that parses JSON resume files to automatically generate beautifully formatted markdown and PDF outputs.
highlights: Utilized Node.js and Inquirer.js for interactive CLI prompts.
Integrated with the Puppeteer library to export styled HTML pages into high-quality PDFs.

references.name: John Smith
references.reference: Jane is an exceptional engineer. Her ability to break down complex architectural problems and deliver scalable solutions is truly top-tier. Highly recommended.
